name: Antelope
hint: A graceful herbivore known for its slender legs and distinctive horns.

name: Buffalo
hint: A massive mammal with shaggy fur and large, curving horns.

name: Cheetah
hint: A spotted big cat known for its incredible speed and agility.

name: Dolphin
hint: A highly intelligent marine mammal known for its playful nature.

name: Elephant
hint: A giant land animal with a long trunk and tusks.

name: Flamingo
hint: A tall, pink wading bird known for its distinctive curved bill.

name: Giraffe
hint: A long-necked herbivore with a spotted coat and unique pattern.

name: Hippopotamus
hint: A large, water-loving mammal known for its massive jaws and teeth.

name: Iguana
hint: A reptile with scales and a long tail, often found in tropical regions.

name: Jaguar
hint: A powerful big cat with a distinctive rosette pattern on its fur.

name: Kangaroo
hint: A marsupial known for its powerful hind legs and pouch for carrying young.

name: Lion
hint: A majestic big cat known as the 'King of the Jungle.'

name: Monkey
hint: An intelligent primate known for its playful and mischievous behavior.

name: Nile Crocodile
hint: A large reptile found in African rivers, known for its powerful jaws.

name: Ostrich
hint: A flightless bird with long legs and a distinctive neck.

name: Panda
hint: A black and white bear native to China, known for its peaceful demeanor.

name: Quokka
hint: A small marsupial with a friendly and smiling appearance.

name: Rhinoceros
hint: A massive herbivore with thick skin and one or two horns on its snout.

name: Sloth
hint: A slow-moving mammal known for hanging from trees in tropical forests.

name: Tiger
hint: A large, striped cat known for its strength and beauty.

name: Uakari
hint: A bright red-faced monkey found in South America.

name: Vulture
hint: A scavenging bird known for feeding on carrion.

name: Walrus
hint: A large marine mammal with long tusks and a thick blubber layer.

name: X-ray Tetra
hint: A small fish known for its translucent body and red markings.

name: Yak
hint: A domesticated bovine animal with long hair, native to the Himalayas.

name: Zebra
hint: A black and white striped herbivore found in African grasslands.
